body.title: [sprint] Delete dead direct-provider paths from inference_gateway.py
body.intention: I intend that no direct provider call or OPENROUTER_ env read remains in inference_gateway.py once both surfaces route through the Proxy.
body.description:
**Problem:** After A+B repoint reason() and call() through the Proxy, the direct-provider machinery in inference_gateway.py is dead: from_env reasoner instantiation (L356-417 _t2/_t3/_t35/_t4), _h_ollama (L848), _h_or (L898), urllib import (L126), OPENROUTER_* env reads (L384/389/393-401/900/906/1041/1058/1075/1324/1329). The original ticket's test #1 (grep gateway for direct provider/urllib/OPENROUTER_ -> 0) is satisfied here.
**Proposed shape:** Remove the now-unreferenced reasoner instantiation, raw handlers, urllib import, and OPENROUTER_* reads. Drop or repoint imports of inference_ollama/inference_openrouter reasoner CLASSES if no longer used by the gateway (coordinate with T-igor-inference-bypassers which may still touch reasoners elsewhere). Confirm nothing else imports the removed symbols.
**Affected files:** inference_gateway.py; possibly cognition/inference_ollama.py, cognition/inference_openrouter.py if fully orphaned.
**Design rules:** flag-direct-provider-calls; no dead code.
**Scope boundary:** IN — delete dead provider paths in the gateway; the grep-clean proof. OUT — the bypassers outside the gateway (T-igor-inference-bypassers).
**Test plan:** (1) grep inference_gateway.py for urllib|OPENROUTER_|OllamaReasoner|OpenRouterReasoner -> 0. (2) full igor cognition import + a reason()/call() smoke still green (no orphaned-symbol ImportError). RED achievable by asserting absence.
**Completion criteria:** gateway has zero direct-provider code; tests green.
